$description: JioGames DLS — single source of truth. Edit values HERE only, then regenerate: `python3 tokens/build.py`. tokens.css is a GENERATED artifact. Docs and components reference tokens, never raw values.

$platforms.$description: Responsive overrides for semantic aliases. Generator emits these as @media blocks so platform values live in the source, not hand-authored CSS.

jio.$description: Primary brand green — CTAs, active borders, eyebrows, checks

ultimate.$description: Ultimate Pass accent — bright green (NOT blue)

mint.$description: Secondary brand accent — campaign support, info accents, decorative highlights. Never CTA/selected/focus/nav/Ultimate Pass.

cyan.$description: Legacy decorative category token. Prefer --mint for brand-approved secondary accent.

violet.$description: Category coding ONLY — never a brand/primary/premium accent

pill.$description: Primary buttons, action chips — ALWAYS pill, never rectangular

space.$description: 8px base unit (token number ≈ value/8). Use these for ALL padding/margin/gap. Half-steps (.025=2, .05=4, 1.5=12) for fine internals. No value outside the scale unless approved (§10). CSS names replace '.' with '-'.

1-5.$description: space.1.5 — card item gap, compact groups (= --card-gap)

3.$description: space.3 — internal section padding, form groups

4.$description: space.4 — major section gap on mobile (= --rail-gap)

5.$description: space.5 — page block spacing on web

8.$description: space.8 — hero spacing, large web gaps

10.$description: space.10 — TV safe zone, large layout inset

layout.$description: Semantic spacing aliases (platform-aware) + frame/grid/breakpoint contract. Designers use ALIASES, not raw scale values, for layout. Mobile/TV rail-first; Web adds a 12-column grid.

gutter.$description: Page inset — edge→content. Mobile 16 / Web 40 / TV 80. (20px banned — off scale.)

section-gap.$description: Vertical gap between major sections/rails. Mobile 32 / Web 48 / TV 64. (= --rail-gap)

card-gap.$description: Gap between cards in rail/grid. Mobile 12 / Web 24 / TV 24.

component-padding.$description: Default inside-component padding. Mobile 16 / Web 24 / TV 32.

card-padding.$description: Card internal padding. Mobile 16 / Web 24 / TV 32.

sheet-padding.$description: Bottom-sheet padding. Mobile 24 / Web 32 / TV n/a.

hero-gap.$description: Hero / major visual break. Mobile 32 / Web 64 / TV 96.

tv-safe.$description: TV safe-zone inset on all sides

hero-text-max.$description: Max hero text width on web (520–640)

grid-columns-mobile.$description: Conceptual alignment grid; layout is rail/flex

control.$description: Component control heights and minimum target sizes. Platform-aware values override via $platforms. Use these tokens in all component CSS — never raw px for heights.

ctrl-h.$description: Primary control height — button, main CTA. Mobile/Web 54 / TV 72.

ctrl-h-sm.$description: Small CTA height. Mobile/Web ONLY — below TV touch-min (60px). Do not use on TV.

ctrl-h-ghost.$description: Ghost/skip button height. Mobile/Web ONLY — below TV touch-min (60px). Do not use on TV.

touch-min.$description: Min tap target (mobile 44 / TV 60). Visual height and touch target are independent — a visually compact element must still meet touch-min via transparent padding.

otp-box-w.$description: OTP digit box width. Mobile/Web only.

otp-box-h.$description: OTP digit box height. Mobile/Web only.

card-wide-w.$description: Landscape game card width. Mobile 272 / TV 400.

card-sq.$description: Square game card dimension (width = height). All platforms.

genre-tile-h.$description: Genre selection tile height. All platforms.

tab-bar-h.$description: Floating pill tab bar height. Mobile/Web only.

app-bar-h.$description: Sticky site/app header height. Web only.

icon-size-xs.$description: icon.size.xs — card meta, timestamps, inline label

icon-size-sm.$description: icon.size.sm — inline with body text, perk checks

icon-size-lg.$description: icon.size.lg — feature icon, large action, TV card meta

icon-size-xl.$description: icon.size.xl — hero context, TV nav, TV focusable controls

icon-color-default.$description: icon.color.default — inactive icon on dark bg, semi-transparent. Use instead of --text3 proxy.

icon-color-active.$description: icon.color.active — selected/active icon (same value as --jio; semantically independent)

motion.$description: Use duration and easing tokens for all UI transitions. Raw durations are allowed only inside approved named keyframe recipes (motion.md §6). Never use transition: all.

spring.$description: Default enter easing — most UI elements

spring-bounce.$description: Playful feedback — OTP fill, genre tile select, success states

ease-out.$description: Fades, overlay appear, tooltip enter — NOT for UI state transitions

dur-instant.$description: Tiny feedback — ripple, micro tap response

dur-fast.$description: Press, focus, active state, chip select

dur-pop.$description: OTP box fill, check icon appear — spring-bounce easing

dur-enter.$description: Content enter animations — fade-up, tile-in, stagger sequences

dur-screen.$description: Screen-to-screen slide transition (same value as dur-enter; semantically independent)
